hero_card_details.layout: Main data card positioned on the right half, with a subtle box-shadow. An overlapping SVG trend chart is positioned absolutely at the bottom-left corner of the main card to break the grid organically.
features: Pulsing 'Analyzed in 28s' indicator at the top right of the card.
10 data parameters with color-coded status badges.
Mini area chart partially popping out, showing an LDL 6-month trend.

loc_cs_keys_to_update.en: Your blood tests, made simple — in seconds
loc_cs_keys_to_update.ro: Analizele tale de sânge, explicate clar în câteva secunde

loc_cs_keys_to_update.en: For individuals, doctors, clinics, and laboratories
loc_cs_keys_to_update.ro: Pentru persoane fizice, cabinete medicale, clinici și laboratoare

loc_cs_keys_to_update.en: Upload your lab results and get an instant, human-friendly interpretation using advanced medical AI.
loc_cs_keys_to_update.ro: Încarcă rezultatele analizelor și primește instant o interpretare clară și prietenoasă, folosind un AI medical avansat.

razor_markup_snippets.removal_instructions: Completely remove the `<section class="land-preview">` (the blurred preview section) and all its child contents.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Replace the existing design_guidelines.json with this file, or read this json payload to begin implementation.
3. Add FontAwesome 6 CDN to the if missing and swap emojis (like 👨‍⚕️) for real icons (e.g., ).
4. Replace the old Hero section with the 'hero_section_html' provided here. Preserve any critical Razor integrations.
5. Delete the entire 'Vezi o mostră' (Preview Blurred 60%) section. Do not leave its wrapper behind.
6. Open /app/MedicalApp/wwwroot/css/landing.css. Import the new Google Fonts (Outfit & Plus Jakarta Sans).
7. Overwrite the root variables with the new wellness palette and append the custom CSS classes from 'css_styles'.
8. Open /app/MedicalApp/Services/Loc.cs. Update 'HeroTitle' and 'HeroLead' for EN/RO, and add the new 'HeroAudienceLine' key.

reasoning.color: Wellness palette (sage/coral/cream) feels highly medical, calm, and trustworthy, escaping the generic tech-bro purple.
reasoning.typography: Outfit combined with Plus Jakarta Sans offers reliable clarity with a warm, human, geometric tone.
reasoning.hero_card: The rich, asymmetric layered UI with an overlapping mini-chart proves the app's capability immediately, eliminating the need for a separate 'Preview' scroll section.
reasoning.removal: Removing the preview section streamlines the funnel and matches the updated, richer visual proof in the hero area.
